deck_policy.unmute_policy: Only unmute after rights/provenance review, source credit review, and operator approval.

purpose: Metadata-only public-domain source deck handoff for Ableton Live 12 / Max for Live sampling and reference work.

required_before_unmute: source_id appears in sources/public-domain/download-ledger.json
rights_status is public_domain, cc0, or cc_by
credit line is carried into release notes
no raw sample path is written into tracked repo artifacts
